howItWorks.intro: This gravitational force calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Newton's Law of Gravitation
rules.explanation: Force between two masses separated by distance r.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: Why does distance matter so much?
faq.a: Force decreases with the square of distance — doubling distance reduces force to 1/4.
